/usr/bin/c++    -rdynamic CMakeFiles/get_rectify_sample.dir/get_rectify_sample.cpp.o CMakeFiles/get_rectify_sample.dir/common_function.cpp.o  -o bin/get_rectify_sample   -L/home/jajayuros1/Documents/RobotInternship2026/RoboticsDevelopWork2026/DataSource/DepthCamera/mo_stereo_camera_driver_v1.4.7_alpha_release_22_11_29/sample/../lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/jajayuros1/Documents/RobotInternship2026/RoboticsDevelopWork2026/DataSource/DepthCamera/mo_stereo_camera_driver_v1.4.7_alpha_release_22_11_29/sample/../lib -lmoStereoCameraDriver -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_highgui.so.4.2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_videoio.so.4.2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgcodecs.so.4.2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_imgproc.so.4.2.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopencv_core.so.4.2.0
